name: POLICY-BUG-1
title: test-backlog003.py asserts 'rules stop at 5' but coding-rules.md only has 4 rules

The test name/intent is stale: either coding-rules.md was supposed to have 5 rules and one is missing, or the test should be updated to assert 'stop at 4'.
